overall.description: A cinematic exploration of ancient Greek architecture in Assassin's Creed Odyssey Discovery Tour mode. The player circles a bronze horse statue in an outdoor plaza, enters the Prytaneion building to explore its columned interior courtyard with NPCs and a rooster, then exits to a monumental terrace with large columns and burning braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with bronze horse statue

events.description: begins circling around the bronze horse statue to view it from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the bronze horse statue, observing it from different angles in the plaza

notable_agents.action: civilian standing near the statue base, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a horse on a stone pedestal, highly detailed with metallic sheen
rectangular stone base with decorative red pattern banding near the top
tall dark green cypress trees lining the edge of the courtyard
ancient stone building with classical entrance and decorative elements
colorful flower petals scattered across the marble pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit ancient Greek courtyard with a prominent bronze horse statue at its center. The camera circles the statue, revealing scattered flower petals on the marble ground and a few NPCs standing nearby. Tall cypress trees and classical stone buildings frame the plaza under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental building entrance with stone portico

events.description: approaching the entrance of the stone building, leaving the open courtyard
entering the shaded doorway, transitioning from bright sunlight to dimmer interior

agents.ego_description: walking toward the building entrance and passing through the monumental doorway into the interior

entered.detail: classical Greek entrance with triangular pediment and columns
large pithos storage jars flanking the entrance steps
carved stone lyre symbols mounted on the wall beside the door
dark opening leading into the building's interior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza into the entrance of the Prytaneion, passing large terracotta storage jars and decorative lyre carvings. The lighting shifts from bright golden hour sun to the shaded interior as the player approaches the doorway leading into the building's courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered peristyle courtyard with central statue

events.description: entering the Prytaneion interior courtyard with columns and statues
moving toward the rear exit area where a rooster is walking around

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior courtyard, observing the architecture, central statue, and NPCs conversing

notable_agents.action: two individuals in ancient Greek attire conversing near the central area
black rooster walking around the marble floor near the exit doorway

entered.detail: open-air courtyard surrounded by colonnades with a central open roof
tall stone columns with blue painted bases supporting the roof structure
large marble statue of a robed figure holding a tall staff
decorative white fabric hangings between the columns
simple stone seating along the courtyard walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the Prytaneion, the camera explores a columned courtyard with blue-painted Doric columns and white decorative drapes. A large robed statue stands centrally while NPCs converse and sit on stone benches. A rooster wanders the marble floor as the player moves toward the rear exit, with warm sunlight filtering through the open roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental terrace with large columns and braziers

events.description: exiting the Prytaneion back into bright sunlight, revealing a monumental terrace
ascending stone steps toward the large bronze statues on the terrace

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and walking up stone steps to explore the monumental terrace with large columns

notable_agents.action: person in red robes bending down near the entrance steps

entered.detail: massive fluted stone columns with ornate capitals
large bronze bowl with burning flames on a stone pedestal
tall bronze figures standing on raised platforms against the cliff face
natural rock formation rising behind the terrace
wide stone steps leading up the terrace

segments.scene_description: Exiting the Prytaneion, the scene opens onto a grand terrace with monumental columns and burning braziers. The camera ascends stone steps toward large bronze statues set against a rocky cliff face. The lighting returns to bright golden hour sun, illuminating the ancient stonework and the figure in red robes near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit open plaza through the shaded interior of a temple and out onto a monumental cliffside terrace. It begins by circling a bronze horse statue amidst scattered flower petals and cypress trees under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves toward the entrance of the Prytaneion, the bright golden light shifts into cool shade, passing terracotta jars and lyre carvings to enter a columned courtyard. The scene then explores this interior space, gliding past blue Doric columns, white drapes, and a wandering rooster before moving toward the rear exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the building and ascends stone steps onto a grand terrace, where burning braziers and bronze statues are illuminated by the returning golden hour sun against a rocky cliff face.
